title: Mystical Plants Legacy
description: Adds magical plants that can be either useful or dangerous
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/257abbdaa440085b281acbf92412ab3dffc746a7.png)
## About
**WARNING:** This mod is still unfinished. Everything here is subject to change until version 1.0.0

Mystical Plants Legacy adds couple of unique magical plants whether is useful or dangerous... Most of them are animated (currently they only animation they do is bounce). 

This mod is inspired by my [old mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mystical-plants) made with MCreator.
## Features
- 🎞 **Animated Plants:** Most of the plants are animated when you interact with them
- ✨ **Elemental Plants:** There's currently 5 Type of Elementals, They can be useful, Dangerous, or even farmable!
- 🛠 **Elemental Tools:** These are endgame tools just like Netherite Tools but every of them had unique abilities.
- 🔎 **Unique way to craft Elemental Tool:** Unlike normal crafting, you need to find the broken one that appears in a specific Elemental Plant's biome to craft these.
## Showcase
### Elemental Tools
![Elemental Tools Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fe8df5f6dbd7e732258b4dbc6628f2a2ccff3a7.png)

You can check [this wiki](https://experionplanet.gitbook.io/wiki/mpl/obtaining-mystical-tools) for guide

❓Will you update the mod to 1.21.2 - 1.21.11+ versions?

I'm not sure, I'm still new to modding so I might unable to do that right now, especially for this big project.
